business_ideas.idea: Amorex Oil: oil brokerage doing $4.7B in bookings within 4 years, sold for $1B.
Hamilton Resource: oil cargo trading between countries with billions in revenue.
United Waste Management: consolidate fragmented mom-and-pop waste operators.
United Rentals: consolidate equipment rental market via acquisition and organic.
XPO Logistics: consolidate fragmented $13T transportation and logistics industry.
Hire psychologically-tested hungry salespeople with base+huge incentive upside.
Rental Man: software platform to integrate hundreds of rental business acquisitions.

predictions.text: Brad Jacobs built 5 companies to $1B+ by finding fragmented industries and consolidating.
United Rentals leaped past Hertz to #1 position within 13 months of launch.
Buying at 5-10x earnings on fragmented businesses allows platform economics to work.
